ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation run */,
  "pause_time" INTEGER /* Pause time in the simulation (in seconds) */,
  "repetition" INTEGER /* Repetition number of the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "sim_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation (in seconds) */,
  "network_model" TEXT /* Type of network model used */,
  "mobility_model" TEXT /* Type of mobility model used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the simulation run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the simulation */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Additional simulation parameters in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_mobility_model FOREIGN KEY ("mobility_model") REFERENCES mobility_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_network_model FOREIGN KEY ("network_model") REFERENCES network_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the node belongs to */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., TARPNetwork.node[39].generic.np) */,
  "node_config" TEXT /* Configuration details of the node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Initial location of the node */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Initial speed of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the node */,
  "last_heard" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last communication or activity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the node */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the metric belongs to */,
  "mean_nb_hops" INTEGER /* Mean number of hops */,
  "nb_data_packets_forwarded" INTEGER /* Number of data packets forwarded */,
  "nb_data_packets_received" INTEGER /* Number of data packets received */,
  "nb_data_packets_sent" INTEGER /* Number of data packets sent */,
  "nb_spd_drops" INTEGER /* Number of speed drops */,
  "latency" INTEGER /* Average latency for packet transmission */,
  "throughput" INTEGER /* Throughput of the node */,
  "jitter" INTEGER /* Jitter in packet transmission */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Rate of packet loss */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption of the node */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the metric */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the network model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the network model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the model */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobility_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobility model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the mobility model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mobility model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the mobility model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the model */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the user account */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, run, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the log entry */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the configuration */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_configs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the result belongs to */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., log, report, graph) */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data or file path of the result */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the simulation results */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the result */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)
